generated_oml:
namespace base = "http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#"
namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time data synchronization and interactive visualization for infrastructure monitoring"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Operational decision support from predictive analytics services"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control operations for physical infrastructure with policy-based safety validation",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Ability to extend services via standardized plugin architecture",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTimeDataExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital systems",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization for monitoring and control operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlAction
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for decision-making",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance CustomServiceExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Customizable service extensions via standardized plugin architecture",
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceExtensionAction
]

instance MDEFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering framework for automated DT artifact generation from enriched BIM",
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance TwinLight : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Research project providing foundational support for MDE framework"
]

instance BOREALIS : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Research project providing foundational support for MDE framework"
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for policy-based validation of value ranges and units, persistent event storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataExchangeService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance Hono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for at-least-once message delivery in real-time data synchronization",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataExchangeService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance TwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point for custom services integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceExtensionService
]

instance FeatureParser : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Standardized extension point for custom services integration",
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomServiceExtensionService
]

instance LightTwinComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization component processing Revit-specific photometric values for UE5 scene rendering",
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance BIMModelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for BIM model data source"
]

instance OperationalDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for runtime operational data from building control system"
]

instance PhotometricDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Virtual sensor for Revit-specific photometric values"
]

instance BIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BIMModelSensor
]

instance OperationalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OperationalDataSensor
]

instance PhotometricDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhotometricDataSensor
]

instance BIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Geometric and semantic data from Revit/IFC BIM models",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMDataTransmitted
]

instance OperationalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime operational data from sensors and controllers in building control system",
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalDataTransmitted
]

instance PhotometricData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Revit-specific photometric values for visualization rendering",
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhotometricDataTransmitted
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Primary geometric and semantic data source using Revit/IFC format",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFramework
]

instance LightingSystemActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Actuator for lighting systems controlled via Eclipse Ditto and Hono with DittoDevice addressing pre-execution checks enforce value ranges and safety constraints"
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingSystemActuator
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration, where the DT Framework acts as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, coordinating roles across the DT life cycle, and addressing scalability from individual components to entire infrastructure systems, interoperability, maintainability, and accessibility requirements."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The life cycle stages encompass initial device modeling within BIM environments by Building Control Engineers, where sensors, actuators, and controllers are defined to establish a unified semantic foundation. This is followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) processes that automatically transform enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts. Subsequent stages include real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization between physical and digital systems, interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor and control operations, and modular architecture with standardized extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom analytics services, thereby supporting continuous evolution throughout the asset's operational life."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation enforcing value ranges and units for sensor data, and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured via Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, mitigating network failures. The model-driven transformation process ensures accurate synchronization between physical assets and the DT through structured data validation."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Automated deployment process enabling reproducible DT setups with runtime configuration management for adjustments without full redeployment, supported by a modular architecture featuring standardized extension points for scalable, service-oriented development in AECO."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with BIM standards for enriched model data, bidirectional data exchange protocols for real-time synchronization, and standardized extension points enabling interoperability across heterogeneous systems including enterprise applications and IoT devices, addressing scalability and maintainability requirements."
]
